zh.West Hythe, Kent, England: 英國肯特韋斯特 海
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan FitzBernard於大約1234年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne45歲，母親Joan Aquillon25歲。她於大約1274年與Sir Guncelin Badlesmere在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫享年77歲，埋葬在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫。

zh-hans.Kingsdown, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特金斯堂
zh-hans.West Hythe, Kent, England: 英国肯特韋斯特 海
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan FitzBernard于大约1234年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne45岁，母亲Joan Aquillon25岁。她于大约1274年与Sir Guncelin Badlesmere在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫享年77岁，埋葬在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan FitzBernard was born about 1234, in Kent, England, her father, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, was 45 and her mother, Joan Aquillon, was 25. She married Sir Guncelin Badlesmere about 1274, in Badlesmere, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1310, in Badlesmere, Kent, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Badlesmere, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan FitzBernard est née environ 1234, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joan Aquillon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Guncelin Badlesmere environ 1274, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1310, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan FitzBernard um 1234 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne 45 und ihre Mutter Joan Aquillon 25. Sie hat um 1274 in Badlesmere, Kent, England Sir Guncelin Badlesmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1310 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Badlesmere, Kent, England und wurde in Badlesmere, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan FitzBernard è nata il circa 1234 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Joan Aquillon, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Guncelin Badlesmere circa 1274, nel Badlesmere, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1310, nel Badlesmere, Kent, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Badlesmere, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan FitzBernardが約1234年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowneは45歳，母Joan Aquillonは25歳であった。約1274年にイギリスケントバドレスメアでSir Guncelin Badlesmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年にイギリスケントバドレスメアで77歳で死去し，イギリスケントバドレスメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan FitzBernard(이)가 대략 1234년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Aquillon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1274년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 Sir Guncelin Badlesmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 바들레스머에 묻혔다.

pt.1234: de 8 de janeiro de 1234 a 7 de janeiro de 1235
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan FitzBernard nasceu aproximadamente 1234, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan Aquillon, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Guncelin Badlesmere aproximadamente 1274, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1310, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan FitzBernard родилась около 1234 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Aquillon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Guncelin Badlesmere около 1274 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1310 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan FitzBernard nació aproximadamente 1234, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Joan Aquillon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Guncelin Badlesmere aproximadamente 1274, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1310, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra.
